metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins, skills, and agents.

plugins.name: writer
plugins.description: Write prose that sounds authentically human rather than AI-generated.

plugins.name: storyteller-guidance
plugins.description: Craft presentations, pitches, talks, and any communication that needs to persuade, inspire, or move an audience. A working storytelling coach grounded in established narrative-craft principles.

plugins.name: track
plugins.description: Console-native billable hours tracker. Slash commands (/track:start, /track:stop, /track:pause, /track:resume, /track:status, /track:report) record billable sessions to a git-versioned plaintext ledger under ~/.time-tracker/.
